title: Vidyarthi Online Nikal 2026 - Full Student Result Management App

requirements.text: Implement backend data models and CRUD operations in the Motoko actor for: School (UDISE number, school name, taluka, district, year, class), Teacher (name, DOB, class, division, mobile number, UDISE number), Student (UDISE number, teacher name, class, division, student name, attendance number, DOB, mother's name, school name, taluka, district), Result (student ID, semester 1 grades for 9 subjects, special progress, hobby, improvement notes; same fields for semester 2), and TeacherLogin (UDISE number, mobile number). Expose query and update functions for add, edit, delete, and fetch for each entity. All data must be stored in stable variables in the canister for lifetime persistence and cross-device sync.

quotes: सर्व data सर्व devices वर data sync करा canister-based storage add करा. हे app लाईफ time वापरता येईल असे बनवा.

acceptanceCriteria: School records can be created, read, updated, and deleted via canister calls
Teacher records can be created, read, updated, and deleted via canister calls
Student records can be created, read, updated, and deleted via canister calls
Result records (semester 1 & 2) can be created, read, updated, and deleted per student
TeacherLogin records (UDISE + mobile) can be created, read, updated, and deleted
All data persists across canister upgrades using stable variables
Backend exposes query functions to get stats: total students by UDISE, students with results, students without results

requirements.text: Implement a three-role authentication system on the frontend. Admin login uses username 'admin' and password 'admin'. Teacher login uses a mobile number that is validated against TeacherLogin records stored in the canister. Student login uses UDISE number + class + division + attendance number validated against Student records in the canister. Store the authenticated session (role, identity fields) in React state. Provide a logout button accessible from all pages.

quotes: Admin login Username - admin Password - admin
Teacher login मोबाईल नंबर ने लॉगिन होईल
Student login निकाल - यु डायस नंबर इयत्ता तुकडी हजेरी नंबर

acceptanceCriteria: Admin can log in with username 'admin' and password 'admin'
Teacher can log in with a mobile number registered in TeacherLogin records
Student can log in with UDISE number + class + division + attendance number matching a student record
Invalid credentials show an error message
Logout clears the session and redirects to the login page
The login page has a stylish, colorful design with role-selection tabs or cards

requirements.text: Build a collapsible (folding) sidebar navigation dashboard visible after login. The sidebar contains 8 menu items: Home, School Info (शाळा माहिती), Teacher Info (शिक्षक माहिती), Student Info (विद्यार्थी माहिती), Enter Result (निकाल भरा), Progress Report (प्रगती पत्रक), Student Result Print (विद्यार्थी निकाल Print), Teacher Manage. Apply role-based visibility: Admin sees all 8 pages; Teacher sees Home, School Info, Teacher Info, Student Info, Enter Result, Progress Report, Student Result Print; Student sees only Student Result Print. The sidebar must be collapsible to icons-only on mobile.
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar collapses to icon-only mode and expands to full labels
Admin can see and access all 8 menu pages
Teacher sees 7 pages (all except Teacher Manage)
Student sees only Student Result Print page
Active menu item is visually highlighted
Sidebar is mobile-responsive

requirements.text: Build the Home page with three colored summary stat cards. Card 1: Total Students for the school (filtered by logged-in teacher's UDISE or all schools for admin). Card 2: Students with results entered. Card 3: Students without results entered. Each card must have a distinct background color and show a count. Admin sees stats across all schools; teacher sees stats for their school's UDISE.
acceptanceCriteria: Three colored stat cards are displayed on the Home page
Card 1 shows total student count
Card 2 shows count of students with at least one result record
Card 3 shows count of students with no result records
Stats reflect real-time data from the canister

requirements.text: Build the School Info page. Include an 'Add New School' button that opens a modal/form with fields: UDISE Number, School Name, Taluka, District, Year, Class. On submit, save the record to the canister. Display all saved school records in a data table with Edit and Delete action buttons in each row. Edit pre-fills the form; Delete removes the record after confirmation.

quotes: नवीन शाळा button वर क्लिक केल्यावर शाळा माहिती फॉर्म open होईल
शाळेचा युडायस नंबर, शाळेचे नाव, तालुका, जिल्हा, वर्ष, इयत्ता

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Add New School' opens a form modal
Form has all 6 fields: UDISE Number, School Name, Taluka, District, Year, Class
Submitting saves the record and it appears in the data table immediately
Each row has small Edit and Delete buttons
Edit opens the form pre-filled with the row's data
Delete removes the record after a confirmation prompt

requirements.text: Build the Teacher Info page. Include an 'Add New Teacher' button that opens a modal/form with fields: Teacher Name, Date of Birth, Class, Division, Mobile Number, School UDISE Number, School Name (auto-filled from UDISE), Taluka (auto-filled from UDISE), District (auto-filled from UDISE). When the user enters a UDISE number, automatically populate School Name, Taluka, and District from the saved school records. On submit, save to the canister. Display all teachers in a data table with Edit and Delete buttons.

quotes: शिक्षक नाव, जन्म दिनांक, इयत्ता, तुकडी, मोबाईल नंबर, शाळेचा युडायस नंबर
शाळेचे नाव (शाळेचा युडायस नंबर वरून ऑटोमॅटिक घ्या)

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Add New Teacher' opens a form modal
Entering a UDISE number auto-fills School Name, Taluka, and District
Form has all 9 fields
Saved teacher appears in the data table
Edit and Delete buttons work correctly per row

requirements.text: Build the Student Info page. Include an 'Add New Student' button that opens a modal/form with fields: UDISE Number, Teacher Name (dropdown populated from teacher records filtered by UDISE), Class (auto-filled from selected teacher), Division (auto-filled from selected teacher), Student Name, Attendance Number, Date of Birth, Mother's Name, School Name (auto from UDISE), Taluka (auto from UDISE), District (auto from UDISE). On submit, save to the canister. Display all students in a data table with Edit and Delete buttons.

quotes: विद्यार्थी नाव, हजेरी नंबर, जन्म दिनांक, आईचे नाव

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Add New Student' opens a form modal
Teacher Name dropdown is populated from teacher records matching the entered UDISE
Selecting a teacher auto-fills Class and Division
Entering UDISE auto-fills School Name, Taluka, District
All 11 fields are present in the form
Submitted student appears in the data table with Edit and Delete buttons

requirements.text: Build the Enter Result (निकाल भरा) page. Include a UDISE dropdown to select a school; upon selection auto-populate a student dropdown. Selecting a student auto-fills Student Name, Class, Division. The form has two sections: Semester 1 (प्रथम सत्र) and Semester 2 (द्वितीय सत्र). Each section contains: 9 subject rows (Bhasha/भाषा, Hindi/हिंदी, English/इंग्रजी, Maths/गणित, Parisar Abhyas 1/परिसर अभ्यास भाग1, Parisar Abhyas 2/परिसर अभ्यास भाग2, Art/कला, Work Experience/कार्यानुभव, Physical Education/शारीरिक शिक्षण) each with a Grade dropdown (options: अ1, अ2, ब1, ब2, क1, क2, ड, इ1, ई2), plus text fields for Special Progress (विशेष प्रगती), Hobby/Interest (आवड/छंद), and Needs Improvement (सुधारणा आवश्यक). Submit saves to canister. Display saved results in a data table with Edit and Delete buttons.

quotes: विषय नाव - भाषा, हिंदी, इंग्रजी, गणित

acceptanceCriteria: UDISE dropdown filters students; student selection auto-fills Name, Class, Division
Semester 1 section has all 9 subject grade dropdowns with correct grade options
Semester 2 section has the same structure as Semester 1
Each semester section has Special Progress, Hobby, and Needs Improvement text fields
Submit saves the result record to the canister
Saved results appear in a data table with Edit and Delete buttons

requirements.text: Build the Progress Report (प्रगती पत्रक) page. Provide four dropdowns: UDISE Number, Class (इयत्ता), Division (तुकडी), Attendance Number (हजेरी नंबर). A 'Search Progress Report' button fetches and displays a formatted progress report card showing: full school information, full student information, Semester 1 results (all 9 subjects with grades, special progress, hobby, needs improvement), and Semester 2 results in the same format. Include a Print button (triggers browser print) and a Download button (downloads the report as a printable HTML or PDF view).

quotes: प्रगती पत्रक page - मध्ये यु डायस नंबर(drop डाउन), इयत्ता (drop डाउन), तुकडी(drop डाउन), हजेरी नंबर(drop डाउन)
शाळेची सर्व माहिती, विद्यार्थी सर्व माहिती व विद्यार्थी निकाल

acceptanceCriteria: All four dropdowns are present and cascade correctly
Search button retrieves and displays the full formatted progress report
Report shows school info, student info, Semester 1 results, and Semester 2 results
Print button triggers the browser's print dialog with a clean print layout
Download button initiates a file download of the report

requirements.text: Build the Student Result Print (विद्यार्थी निकाल Print) page. This page is identical in functionality to the Progress Report page: four dropdowns (UDISE, Class, Division, Attendance Number), a Search button, display of full school + student + semester 1 & semester 2 result information, a Print button, and a Download button. This page must be accessible to Admin, Teacher, and Student roles. For Student role, pre-fill the dropdowns with the logged-in student's UDISE, class, division, and attendance number.

quotes: विद्यार्थी निकाल print मध्ये यु डायस नंबर, इयत्ता, तुकडी, हजेरी नंबर

acceptanceCriteria: Page is accessible to all three roles
For student login, dropdowns are pre-filled with the student's own credentials
Search retrieves and displays the full result report
Print and Download buttons work correctly
Student role cannot navigate to any other page from this view

requirements.text: Build the Teacher Manage page (admin-only). Include an 'Add New Teacher Login' button that opens a form with two fields: School UDISE Number and Teacher Mobile Number. On submit, save to the canister's TeacherLogin store. Display all teacher login records in a data table with Edit and Delete buttons. This page is only visible and accessible to the Admin role.

quotes: शाळेचा यु डायस नंबर, शिक्षक मोबाईल नंबर
data टेबल मध्ये दिसेल आणि तो एडिट आणि डिलीट करता येईल

acceptanceCriteria: Page is visible only to admin role
Add New Teacher Login form has UDISE and Mobile Number fields
Submitted records appear in the data table
Edit and Delete buttons work per row
Teacher login mobile numbers saved here are used to authenticate teacher logins

requirements.text: Apply a vibrant, colorful, mobile-first visual theme throughout the entire app. Use a gradient-rich color palette with warm and energetic accent colors (avoid blue/purple dominance). Use bold typography, card-based layouts, smooth transitions on sidebar collapse/expand, and colorful section headers. The login page should have a distinct illustrated or gradient hero area with role-selection cards. The dashboard sidebar must be visually distinct with colored icons. All data tables and forms must look clean and modern on mobile screens.

quotes: स्टायलिश लूक आणि कलर फुल असावे

acceptanceCriteria: Login page has a colorful hero area with clearly differentiated role-selection options
Dashboard sidebar has colored icons and smooth collapse animation
All pages use a consistent vibrant color palette
Data tables are readable and well-spaced on mobile
Forms use clear labels, proper spacing, and colored submit buttons
Overall design is mobile-responsive and works well on phone screen widths

constraints: Admin credentials are hardcoded: username = 'admin', password = 'admin'
Teacher authentication uses mobile number matched against TeacherLogin records in the canister
Student authentication uses UDISE + class + division + attendance number matched against Student records
All application data must be stored in the Motoko canister using stable variables for lifetime persistence
Student role can only access the Student Result Print page
Teacher Manage page is only accessible to Admin role
Do not use Internet Identity for authentication in this app
Grade options are exactly: अ1, अ2, ब1, ब2, क1, क2, ड, इ1, ई2
Subjects are exactly 9: भाषा, हिंदी, इंग्रजी, गणित, परिसर अभ्यास भाग1/सा. विज्ञान, परिसर अभ्यास भाग2/सा. शास्त्र, कला, कार्यानुभव, शारीरिक शिक्षण
nonGoals: No Internet Identity or social login integration
No external database or cloud storage — only canister storage
No marks/numeric scoring — only grade categories (श्रेणी) are used
No student registration self-service — students are registered by admin/teacher only

required: Colorful school education themed app logo with a graduation cap and open book illustration, warm orange and green tones (app-logo.dim_256x256.png)
Vibrant gradient login page background with abstract school/education motifs like pencils, stars, and books in warm colors (login-bg.dim_1080x1920.png)
